summary: Comprehensive testing of Pick of the Day (POTD) and PWA Mobile Optimization features. All backend and frontend tests passed. Both features are fully functional.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/pick-of-the-day returns valid pick with date, available=true, pick object containing playerName, teamName, opponentName, propType, suggestedLine, recommendation, confidenceScore, sharpSummary
Backend: POTD caching works - calling endpoint twice returns same generatedAt timestamp
Backend: POTD pick has valid propType (shots_on_target in current test)
Backend: GET /manifest.json returns valid JSON with name, short_name, icons, theme_color, display:standalone
Backend: /service-worker.js is accessible and returns valid JavaScript with cache logic
Backend: index.html contains apple-mobile-web-app-capable, apple-touch-icon, manifest link
Backend: Owner auto-login (josselj001@gmail.com) still works - bypasses password
Frontend: POTD card visible at top of Predict tab after login
Frontend: POTD card shows player name (Khvicha Kvaratskhelia), matchup (Georgia vs Israel), stats row (Shots On Target/1.5/92%), recommendation badge (OVER/VERY HIGH), sharp summary
Frontend: 'Run Full Analysis' button populates Natural Search input with player query
Frontend: Mobile responsive at 390px width - POTD card displays properly without horizontal overflow (card width 362px fits in 390px viewport)
Frontend: POTD skeleton loader appears briefly before card loads
critical_code_review_comments: POTD endpoint correctly caches results per-day in MongoDB 'potd' collection
Service worker correctly skips API calls (only caches static assets)
PWA manifest has all required fields for installable app
Mobile CSS optimizations work well - no horizontal overflow issues
POTD card integrates well with existing Natural Search functionality
seed_data_creation: None - POTD is auto-generated and cached
context_for_next_testing_agent: POTD and PWA features fully tested and working. Current POTD: Khvicha Kvaratskhelia (Georgia vs Israel) - Shots On Target 1.5 OVER at 92% confidence. POTD is cached daily in MongoDB 'potd' collection. Service worker caches static assets only, not API calls. All previous auth tests from iteration_7 still pass.

key_flows_tested: POTD endpoint returns valid pick with all required fields
POTD caching returns same result on subsequent calls
POTD card visible at top of Predict tab
POTD card shows player name, matchup, stats, recommendation, summary
Run Full Analysis button populates Natural Search input
manifest.json accessible with valid PWA fields
